title: Cobblemon Survival Pack
description: A modpack created by SuperJono based around Cobblemon. However, it also includes tons of quality of life mods, vanilla+ mods, performance mods and even combat mods for the most versatile experience
body:
The modpack created by SuperJono is a comprehensive collection tailored specifically around Cobblemon, seamlessly integrates Pokémon elements into the Minecraft world. Cobblemon enthusiasts will find the modpack to be an immersive experience, allowing them to capture, train, and battle their favorite Pokémon within the familiar blocky landscapes. The integration is thoughtfully executed, ensuring that both the core gameplay of Minecraft and the unique features of Cobblemon are highlighted and enhanced.

In addition to the main Cobblemon mod, this modpack includes a multitude of quality-of-life mods designed to streamline and enrich the player experience. These mods address various aspects of gameplay, such as inventory management, user interface improvements, and enhanced graphics. For example, players can enjoy automated sorting systems for their chests, minimap overlays for easier navigation, and shaders that bring the world to life with vibrant colors and realistic lighting effects. These enhancements are carefully selected to maintain the vanilla feel of Minecraft while providing modern conveniences that make gameplay more enjoyable and efficient.

Furthermore, the modpack is equipped with vanilla+ mods and performance mods to optimize the gaming experience. This includes new biomes, additional crafting recipes, and unique mobs that blend seamlessly with the existing Minecraft universe. Performance mods are also a key component, ensuring that the game runs smoothly even with the added content. Mods like Distant Horizons, Sodium, C2me and Bad Optmizations will drastically change your overall expereince.  Whether you're a seasoned Minecraft veteran or a newcomer to the Cobblemon mod, this modpack offers a well-rounded, high-performance experience that caters to all types of players.
